settings.tagline: Mobile technical service without the runaround.
settings.serviceArea: Brunswick, St. Simons, Nahunta, Waycross, Jesup, and Southeast Georgia routes
settings.epaCertNote: Refrigerant recovery/handling work must be performed only within the operator’s active certification scope and equipment capability.
settings.licenseNote: Key programming, tuning, emissions-adjacent work, and refrigerant services may require local, state, federal, insurance, and manufacturer-specific compliance review before launch.

services.name: Mobile A/C Recovery & Diagnostics
services.summary: On-site A/C system intake, leak-screening workflow, refrigerant recovery planning, and repair-readiness diagnostics.
services.complianceNote: EPA 609/608 scope must be verified before paid refrigerant handling. Service copy is deliberately conservative.

services.name: Rekeying & Key Programming Intake
services.summary: Vehicle key, fob, lock, and access issue intake with VIN-ready workflow and ownership verification checkpoints.
services.complianceNote: Requires proof of authorization/ownership. Some modules require dealer-level or locksmith-licensed service partners.

services.name: Tuning Readiness & Diagnostics
services.summary: Pre-tune health checks, data logging intake, drivability notes, and conservative calibration-readiness consultation.
services.complianceNote: Emissions-related changes must remain lawful for intended road/off-road use. No defeat-device service language.

services.name: Quiet Electric Lawn Maintenance
services.summary: Low-noise electric mow/trim/edge/blow service for small residential yards, rentals, offices, and managed properties.
services.complianceNote: No gas exhaust on-site. Route scope depends on battery capacity, weather, and property size.

bookings.name: Demo Residential Client
bookings.notes: Recurring biweekly interest; prefers quiet morning window.

quotes.serviceMix: Electric lawn routes + vehicle A/C intake days
quotes.message: Wants one vendor for recurring small-yard route and occasional fleet intake days.

reviews.name: Property manager
reviews.text: The best vendor is the one who documents the problem, fixes the workflow, and does not create a second mess. This is built for that kind of client.

reviews.name: Residential client
reviews.text: Quiet, clear, and practical. The service menu makes it easy to ask for help without decoding shop jargon.

reviews.name: Fleet lead
reviews.text: The quote flow asks the right questions: site count, service mix, timing, and what a good outcome looks like.
